overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage following a character with dark hair and traditional clothing exploring a hazy, geothermal landscape. The character traverses rocky highland terrain with scattered ruins, passes active steam vents, and descends into a tall grass wetland with muted autumn colors and atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky highland path with scattered ruins

events.description: geothermal steam plumes become visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill through rocky terrain toward distant steam vents, passing wooden ruins on the left

entered.detail: massive gray rock outcrop with rough texture flanking the path
tall dead tree trunk with no leaves, silhouetted against the sky
dense coniferous trees covering the hillside in the background
hazy mountain peak visible through the atmospheric fog
primitive wooden structures with thatched roofs, partially collapsed

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a rocky highland landscape with sparse vegetation. Large rock formations flank the path while primitive wooden ruins appear on the left. In the distance, steam plumes rise from geothermal vents, and a hazy mountain looms on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal valley with active steam vents

events.description: terrain slopes downward as character descends into the steam vent valley
ground transitions from rocky gravel to dirt with scattered grass patches

agents.ego_description: walking downhill through the geothermal area, navigating around rocks and steam vents

entered.detail: multiple vents releasing thick white steam into the air
large rocks strewn across the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The character descends into a wide valley filled with active geothermal steam vents. The wooden ruins and dead tree disappear behind as the path becomes dirt with scattered boulders. Steam rises prominently from the ground while the forest shifts to the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: tall grass wetland with rocky shoreline

events.description: character steps from rocky terrain into dense tall grass field

agents.ego_description: wading through waist-high grass toward distant forest and mountain, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: dense field of tall green and brown grass reaching character's waist
rocky edge marking the boundary between grass and higher ground
gnarled dead tree with twisted branches leaning over the grass

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dense wetland of tall grass that sways with movement. A rocky shoreline borders the left side while a distinctive twisted dead tree appears ahead. The geothermal steam vents continue to rise in the far distance as the character progresses through the grassy field toward the forest edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rocky highland plateau down into a hazy, geothermal wetland. It begins with the character walking past primitive wooden ruins and large rock formations, with distant steam plumes and a looming mountain visible through the haze. As the character descends into a wide valley, the ruins fade away and the path shifts to dirt and boulders, while active geothermal vents begin to rise prominently from the ground. The scene then transitions into a dense wetland of swaying tall grass bordered by a rocky shoreline, moving past a distinctive twisted dead tree. Finally, the camera progresses through the grassy field toward the forest edge, with the geothermal steam still drifting in the far distance.
